user_request: Update the customer account and send the renewal notice.
workflow_summary: Modify one customer account record and send an external renewal notice.
intended_outcome: Customer account is updated and the renewal message is sent.
first_safe_step: Ask for the exact customer record, confirm permission to edit it, and verify the renewal source before sending anything.
readiness_reason: The workflow affects private account data and external communication, but the target record and approval are not explicit.
